title: 3 Ways Millennials Can Profit From Their Housing Woes
text: Fortune recently reported on a couple of surveys about millennial housing trends.  The first survey from the Bank of America Institute, an economic think tank from BofA.

title: Advisor with Over $730 Million in Assets Joins Ameriprise for Strength in Comprehensive Financial Planning and Advice Capabilities
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Financial advisor F. Pat Cunnane, CIMA®, MBA, recently joined the independent channel of Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) from LPL Financial's Cleveland-based Masters Consulting Group where he managed approximately $733 million in client assets. Cunnane joined Fidant Wealth Partners, an established Ameriprise practice led by Ameriprise private wealth advisor Doug Kisker, CRPC™, APMA™, BFA, with offices in Cincinnati, OH, Cleveland, OH and Crestview Hills, KY.
